column2: Verifying Post-trial Evidence Preservation and Authorization Close-Out Process
column3: ['Verify that the trial supervisor is responsible for post-trial evidence preservation and authorisation close-out. ', 'Confirm that the T&E activity has been carried out safely iaw the direction of the t&e approvals board. ', 'Check if the trial supervisor documents lessons-learned evidence preservation. ', 'Verify that the trial supervisor initiates the authorization close-out process. ', 'Confirm that, when the trial supervisor fails to document lessons-learned evidence preservation or initiate the authorization close-out process, post-trial lessons-learned evidence is not preserved correctly. ', 'Check that the authorisation close-out process is not completed successfully. ']
column4: ['The trial supervisor should be identified as being responsible for ensuring post-trial evidence preservation and authorization close-out. ', 'The T&E activity should have been conducted in a safe manner, following the guidelines set by the T&E Approvals Board. ', "The trial supervisor's documentation of lessons-learned evidence preservation should be present and up to date. ", 'The trial supervisor should have initiated the authorization close-out process. ', 'When the trial supervisor does not perform their duties related to post-trial evidence preservation and authorization close-out, the post-trial lessons-learned evidence should not be properly preserved. ', 'The authorisation close-out process should not have been completed when the trial supervisor fails to perform their duties related to it. ']
